name: codex-workflow
description: Claude-Workflow for Codex, a public repo-backed workflow pack with resumable phase artifacts, automated Codex agent profiles, roadmap mirroring, TDD execution, review, and finalization gates.

interface.shortDescription: Public six-phase Claude-Workflow port for Codex
interface.longDescription: Claude-Workflow for Codex exposes public repo-backed skills and Codex-native agent profiles for project initialization, workflow-init, resumable phase routing, research, ideation, planning, TDD execution, review, documentation docking, and finalization.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude-Workflow for Codex in this repo.
